name: pull_request_author
description: GitHub username of the pull request author.

name: pull_request_timestamp_seconds
description: Time the pull request was created at, as a Unix timestamp.

name: merged_at_timestamp_seconds
description: Time the pull request was merged at, as a Unix timestamp.

name: last_updated_at_timestamp_seconds
description: Time the pull request was last updated at, as a Unix timestamp.

name: pull_request_state
description: The state of this pull request (OPEN, MERGED, etc).

name: associated_commit
description: SHA of the commit associated with the pull request.

name: labels
description: Labels associated with the pull request.

fields.name: labeled_at_timestamp_seconds
fields.description: Time the label was added to this pull request, as a Unix timestamp.

name: requested_reviewers
description: GitHub usernames of Users requested to review the pull request.

name: is_stale_data
description: Whether or not this data is stale, outdated. Stale data will not be amended by daily cronjobs.
